title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Charak Pharma South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Charak Pharma South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Charak Pharma South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Tiruchirappalli. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Charak Pharma South Asia Partners:
Charak Pharma South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Charak Pharma South Asia Partners!
